title: tanacetum paczoskii
intro: Tanacetum paczoskii, also known as Mongolian tansy, is a flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to Mongolia and China. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Tanacetum paczoskii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
